$comment: Machine-readable contract for the Gatepath audit log. Both platforms load this file in their test suites and assert their writer's output conforms. Human-readable docs live in AUDIT_LOG_SCHEMA.md.

blocked_resource_requests.android: Count of resource sub-requests that the WebView refused to load (kernel-level shouldInterceptRequest).
blocked_resource_requests.desktop: Count of resource sub-requests that matched a tracker domain. WebKitGTK's resource-load-started signal is informational; the request is logged but NOT cancelled. See SECURITY_MODEL.md.
